While engulfed, a creature has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the vat, and takes 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Acid damage at the start of each of the vat's turns.

If the vat takes 20 damage or more on a single turn from the engulfed creature, the vat must succeed on a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the creature, which falls in a space within 10 feet of the vat and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the vat dies, an engulfed creature is no longer {@condition Restrained|XPHB} and can escape from the corpse by using 15 feet of movement, exiting {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

A swallowed creature has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the sandworm, and takes 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Acid damage at the start of each of the sandworm's turns.

If the sandworm takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the sandworm must succeed on a {@dc 20} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 5 feet of the sandworm and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the sandworm dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape from the corpse using 20 feet of movement, exiting {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

entries: The dragon uses Spellcasting to cast {@spell Mind Spike|XPHB} (level 3 version).

legendary.name: Recharge
entries: The dragon rolls a {@dice d6}, and regains the use of its Psionic Breath on a roll of a 5 or 6. If it rolls a 5 or 6 and its Psionic Breath is already available, it instead regains 13 ({@dice 2d12}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The xenostiltskin casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

spellcasting.name: Superior Invisibility
headerEntries: The xenostiltskin casts {@spell Greater Invisibility|XPHB} on itself, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Banishing Name
entries: If the xenostiltskin hears its own name outside of the Star Wilds, it is instantly transported somewhere in the Star Wilds.

trait.name: Reality Warper
entries: When the xenostiltskin casts an Illusion spell, it can choose one inanimate, nonmagical object that is part of the illusion and make that object real for the duration. The object can't deal damage or give any conditions.

action.name: Psychic Shenanigans
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 20-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point the xenostiltskin can see within 60 feet. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 5d8}) Psychic damage and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB|D20 Tests} until the start of the xenostiltskin's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

bonus.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The xenostiltskin shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid, or it returns to its true form (that of a Small Fey). Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Anything it is wearing transforms with it.

trait.name: Vehicle
entries: This vehicle is operated by a Medium or smaller creature, which has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects outside the vehicle. It takes its turn on the operator's turn, and only acts if the operator takes the {@action Utilize|XPHB} action to command it to move and take an action. The operator makes {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB|D20 Tests} using Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma on behalf of the vehicle (a +2 bonus by default).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The car uses Auto Turret twice. It can replace one use with one Ram attack.

action.name: Ram
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 4d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Auto Turret
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 14}, one creature the car can see within 100 feet. {@actSaveFail} 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Radiant damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

trait.name: Vehicle
entries: This vehicle is operated by a Medium or smaller creature, which has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Three-Quarters Cover} from effects outside the vehicle. It takes its turn on the operator's turn, and only acts if the operator takes the {@action Utilize|XPHB} action to command it to move and take an action. The operator makes {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB|D20 Tests} using Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma on behalf of the vehicle (a +2 bonus by default).

action.name: Ram
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Vehicle
entries: This vehicle is operated by a Medium or smaller creature, which has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects outside the vehicle. It takes its turn on the operator's turn, and only acts if the operator takes the {@action Utilize|XPHB} action to command it to move and take an action. The operator makes {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB|D20 Tests} using Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma on behalf of the vehicle (a +4 bonus by default).

action.name: Ram
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}42 ({@damage 8d8 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Heavy Cannon
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 17}, each creature in a 10-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point the hovertank can see within 1,000 feet.
If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveFail} 35 ({@damage 10d6}) Force damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

trait.name: Vehicle
entries: This vehicle is operated by a Medium or smaller creature, which has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Half Cover} from effects outside the vehicle. It takes its turn on the operator's turn, and only acts if the operator takes the {@action Utilize|XPHB} action to command it to move and take an action. The operator makes {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB|D20 Tests} using Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma on behalf of the vehicle (a +2 bonus by default).

action.name: Ram
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d10 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Vehicle
entries: This vehicle is operated by a Medium or smaller creature, which has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects outside the vehicle. It takes its turn on the operator's turn, and only acts if the operator takes the {@action Utilize|XPHB} action to command it to move and take an action. The operator makes {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB|D20 Tests} using Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma on behalf of the vehicle (a +3 bonus by default).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The tripod makes two Tentacle attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Heat Ray.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 15 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 4d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}) from one of two tentacles.

action.name: Heat Ray
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 15}, one creature the tripod can see within 100 feet. {@actSaveFail} 35 ({@damage 10d6}) Fire damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} If the target is a creature or a flammable object, it starts burning.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The elemental makes two Ram attacks.

action.name: Ram
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 500 ft. {@h}13 ({@dice 2d8 + 4}) Mega Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Meteoric Charge {@recharge 5}
entries: The elemental moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks} and can move through the spaces of other Mega targets. Each time the elemental enters a Mega target's space for the first time during this move, that target is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave dex} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} 15 ({@dice 2d10 + 4}) Mega Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Mega creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The wyrmling makes two Rend attacks.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@dice 2d6 + 4}) Mega Slashing damage plus 5 ({@dice 1d10}) Mega Radiant damage.

action.name: Radiant Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 14}, each Mega target in a 1,500-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 28 ({@dice 8d6}) Mega Radiant damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The dragon casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 20}, {@hit 12} to hit with spell attacks). It can cast the spell as a Mega spell; see "{@variantrule Magnifying a Spell to Mega Scale|DarkMatter24}" in the Glossary.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day, or 5/Day in Lair)
entries: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon makes three Rend attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast {@spell Guiding Bolt|XPHB} (level 3 version).

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 14}, reach 5 ft. {@h}16 ({@dice 2d8 + 7}) Mega Slashing damage plus 4 ({@dice 1d8}) Mega Radiant damage.

action.name: Radiant Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 22}, each Mega target in a 6,000-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 63 ({@dice 18d6}) Mega Radiant damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

action.name: Void Jump
entries: The dragon performs a guided void jump, as if it were a ship with a class 3 Dark Matter engine.

legendary.name: Cosmic Beam
entries: The dragon uses Spellcasting to cast {@spell Guiding Bolt|XPHB} (level 3 version). The dragon can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Pounce
entries: The dragon moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Rend attack.

legendary.name: Recharge
entries: The dragon rolls a {@dice d6}, and regains the use of its Radiant Breath on a roll of a 5 or 6. If it rolls a 5 or 6 and its Psionic Breath is already available, it instead regains 13 ({@dice 2d12}) Mega {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

trait.name: Fire Aura
entries: At the end of each of the elemental's turns, each Mega target in a 1,000-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the elemental takes 5 ({@dice 1d10}) Mega Fire damage.

trait.name: Fire Form
entries: The elemental can enter a creature's space and stop there. The first time it enters a Mega target's space on a turn, that target takes 5 ({@dice 1d10}) Mega Fire damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The elemental makes two Scorch attacks.

action.name: Scorch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 500 ft. {@h}13 ({@dice 2d8 + 4}) Mega Fire damage.

trait.name: Ship
entries: The transport is a ship that can hold 70 tons and 8 passengers. It has a Maneuverability of 90 degrees.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The transport makes two attacks, using Auto Turret or Pulse Beam in any combination.

action.name: Auto Turret
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 2,500/7,500 ft. {@h}9 ({@dice 2d8}) Mega Necrotic damage.

action.name: Pulse Beam
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 5,000/15,000 ft. (Fixed Front) {@h}11 ({@dice 2d10}) Mega Necrotic damage.

bonus.name: Haunted Movement
entries: The transport turns to face any direction it chooses.

trait.name: Ship
entries: The frigate is a ship that can hold 7,500 tons and 120 passengers. It has a Maneuverability of 90 degrees.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The frigate makes three Auto Turret attacks. It can replace one attack with a Railgun attack.

action.name: Auto Turret
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 9}, range 2,500/7,500 ft. {@h}13 ({@dice 3d8}) Mega Necrotic damage.

action.name: Railgun
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 9}, range 6,000/18,000 ft. (Fixed Front) {@h}33 ({@dice 6d10}) Mega Force damage.

bonus.name: Haunted Movement
entries: The frigate turns to face any direction it chooses.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the gigapod fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The gigapod has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The gigapod makes two Tentacle attacks and uses Swallow.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 5 ft. {@h}15 ({@dice 2d8 + 6}) Mega Bludgeoning damage. The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 19}) from one of ten tentacles, and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends. A ship can end the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition with a Dexterity (Piloting) check against the escape DC.

action.name: Fling
entries: The gigapod throws a Mega target {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by it to a space it can see within 6,000 feet of itself. {@actSave dex} {@dc 19}, the target thrown and each Mega target in the destination space. {@actSaveFail} 27 ({@dice 6d8}) Mega Bludgeoning damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

action.name: Swallow
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 19}, one Mega target {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the gigapod (it can have up to four targets swallowed at a time). {@actSaveFail} 19 ({@dice 3d8 + 6}) Mega Bludgeoning damage and the gigapod swallows the target, which is no longer {@condition Grappled|XPHB}. A swallowed target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition, has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the gigapod, and takes 21 ({@dice 6d6}) Mega Acid damage at the start of each of its turns. If the gigapod takes 30 Mega damage or more on a single turn from a target inside it, the gigapod must succeed on a {@dc 20} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed target, each of which falls in a space within 1,000 feet of the gigapod. If the gigapod dies, any swallowed target no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape from the corpse using 1,500 feet of movement.

legendary.name: Acidic Ink
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 19}, each Mega target within a 3,000-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} origination from the gigapod. {@actSaveFail} 9 ({@dice 2d8}) Mega Acid damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The gigapod can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Alien Movement
entries: The gigapod moves 3,000 feet without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}

legendary.name: Lash
entries: The gigapod makes one Tentacle attack.

trait.name: Gas Form
entries: The elemental can enter a creature's space and stop there.

trait.name: Nebula Invisibility
entries: In nebulae, the elemental has the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The elemental makes two Gust attacks.

action.name: Gust
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@dice 3d6 + 3}) Mega Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Vortex {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 12}, each Mega target in an 2,000-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the elemental. {@actSaveFail} 17 ({@dice 4d6 + 3}) Mega Bludgeoning damage, and the target is pushed up to 2,000 feet in a direction of the elemental's choice. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The ooze makes two attacks, using Pseudopod or Glob in any combination, and uses Engulf.

action.name: Pseudopod
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 1,000 ft. {@h}17 ({@dice 3d8 + 4}) Mega Acid damage.

action.name: Glob
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 3,000/9,000 ft. {@h}16 ({@dice 3d10}) Mega Acid damage and the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is 0 until the start of the ooze's next turn.

action.name: Engulf
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 14}, one mega within 1,000 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target is pulled into the ooze's space and has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}). A ship can end the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition with a Dexterity (Piloting) check against the escape DC. Until the grapple ends, the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, and it takes 21 ({@dice 6d6}) Mega Acid damage at the start of each of its turns. When the ooze moves, the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} target moves with it, costing it no extra movement.

action.name: Harvesting Laser
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4}, range 30/120 ft. {@h}5 ({@dice 2d4}) Mega Radiant damage.

trait.name: Swarm
entries: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny creature. The swarm can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or gain {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The swarm makes three Laser Barrage attacks.

action.name: Laser Barrage
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 30/120 ft. {@h}13 ({@dice 3d8}) Mega Radiant damage or 10 ({@dice 3d6}) Mega Radiant damage if the swarm is {@status Bloodied|XPHB}.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The spaceshark has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the spaceshark's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@dice 2d6 + 2}) Mega Piercing damage.

trait.name: Blood Frenzy
entries: The shark has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The shark makes two Bite attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@dice 4d6 + 4}) Mega Piercing damage.

trait.name: Blood Frenzy
entries: The colossus has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

trait.name: Gravity Defiant
entries: The colossus isn't influenced by gravity, and is immune to spells and other effects that influence gravity.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The colossus makes two Bite attacks and uses Constrict.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 1,500 ft. {@h}24 ({@dice 4d8 + 6}) Mega Piercing damage.

action.name: Constrict
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 18}, one Mega target the colossus can see within 1,000 feet. {@actSaveFail} 23 ({@dice 5d6 + 6}) Mega Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 18}). A ship can end the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition with a Dexterity (Piloting) check against the escape DC.

trait.name: Gravitational Aura
entries: At the end of each of the rift's turns, each Mega target within a 1,000-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the rift is pulled 500 feet toward the rift and takes 5 ({@dice 1d10}) Mega Force damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The rift makes three Cosmic Ray attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Consume.

action.name: Consume
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 19}, one Mega target within 500 feet of the rift. {@actSaveFail} 44 ({@dice 8d10}) Mega Force damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

action.name: Cosmic Ray
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 11}, range 3,000/9,000 ft. {@h}20 ({@dice 4d6 + 6}) Mega Radiant damage.

trait.name: Hard Shell
entries: The first time the turtle takes 15 or more Mega damage from a single attack, its AC decreases by 3. This reduction lasts until the turtle finishes a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB|Short} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

trait.name: Hemisphere Shell
entries: The turtle's shell is a environment with a breathable atmosphere, water, vegetation, and a gravitational field.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The turtle makes two attacks, using Slam or Asteroid Throw in any combination.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 500 ft. {@h}38 ({@dice 6d10 + 5}) Mega Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Asteroid Throw
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 9}, range 6,000/18,000 ft. {@h}33 ({@dice 8d6 + 5}) Mega Bludgeoning damage.
